thumbStoragePath.name: Thumbnail Storage Path
thumbStoragePath.hint: Path inside your User Data folder where generated thumbnails are saved. Must be writable — do not point this at the modules/ directory. Default: token-slurp/thumbs

ui1Cols.name: Quick Picker: Columns
ui1Cols.hint: Number of image columns shown in the HUD inline panel.

ui1Rows.name: Quick Picker: Rows
ui1Rows.hint: Number of visible rows before the HUD panel scrolls.

ui1CellWidth.name: Quick Picker: Cell Width
ui1CellWidth.hint: Width in pixels of each image cell in the HUD inline panel.

ui1CellHeight.name: Quick Picker: Cell Height
ui1CellHeight.hint: Height in pixels of each image cell in the HUD inline panel.

ui2CellWidth.name: Window: Cell Width
ui2CellWidth.hint: Width in pixels of each image cell in the picker window. Columns are filled automatically based on window width.

ui2CellHeight.name: Window: Cell Height
ui2CellHeight.hint: Height in pixels of each image cell in the picker window.

ui2DefaultCols.name: Window: Default Columns
ui2DefaultCols.hint: How many cells wide the window starts when first opened. You can resize it freely afterwards.

ui2DefaultRows.name: Window: Default Rows
ui2DefaultRows.hint: How many cells tall the window starts when first opened. You can resize it freely afterwards.

tokenConfig.browse: Browse to a file (then add wildcards manually)

notifications.noImages: Token Slurp: no images found for this wildcard path.
